availability_zone.description: Specifies the availability zone where the target is located; must match the availability zones of the ALB.

port.description: Specifies the port on which the target receives traffic. Must match a port defined in the associated target group.

target_group_arn.description: ARN of the target group to attach the target to; must be a valid and existing target group.

target_id.description: ID of the target to be attached to the target group; must be an instance ID or IP address.
